title: Valid user can sign in
objective: Verify that an active user can sign in with valid credentials
steps:
Open login page
Enter valid username and password
Submit the form
expectedResult: User lands on the authenticated dashboard

title: Invalid password is rejected
objective: Verify that the system rejects an incorrect password without signing the user in
testDataPreparation: Use existing active user with wrong password
steps:
Open login page
Enter valid username and invalid password
Submit the form
expectedResult: Error message is shown and the user remains unauthenticated
reviewDate: Should not reveal whether the account exists

title: Required fields show validation
objective: Verify required username and password validation
steps:
Open login page
Leave username and password empty
Submit the form
expectedResult: Required-field validation is visible and no request succeeds
reviewDate: Useful for first UI regression demo

title: Locked account cannot sign in
objective: Verify locked account behavior and message
testDataPreparation: Create locked user in test data
steps:
Open login page
Enter locked account credentials
Submit the form
expectedResult: Access is denied with a locked-account message

title: Expired session redirects to login
objective: Verify that an expired authenticated session returns to login
preconditions: User can sign in and session timeout can be simulated
testDataPreparation: Shorten session lifetime or use expired token
steps:
Open app with expired session
Navigate to protected dashboard
Observe redirect or timeout message
expectedResult: User is redirected to login or sees a clear timeout message
reviewDate: May be manual if timeout cannot be controlled

title: Login controls have accessible names
objective: Verify username password and submit controls are labeled for assistive technology
steps:
Open login page
Inspect username field label
Inspect password field label
Inspect submit button accessible name
expectedResult: Inputs and submit action have clear accessible names
reviewDate: Good quick check before deeper a11y tooling
